Venue Info
Media Gallery
The Cynthia Woods Mitchell Pavilion
The Woodlands, TX
Seating Capacity: 19500
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 29
  DMB  (29)

Longest Performance:
09.13.00 - Jimi Thing (24:41)

Song Liberations
  9.21.07 – Fool to Think (after 1112 days)
  5.18.12 – Beach Ball (after 1113 days)
  5.18.12 – You Never Know (after 1022 days)
  5.17.13 – Dreamgirl (after 1078 days)
  5.16.14 – Stolen Away on 55th & 3rd (after 2085 days)
  5.13.16 – Dreamgirl (after 1042 days)
  5.18.18 – Stand Up (For It) (after 3882 days)
  5.18.18 – What You Are (after 1813 days)
  5.18.18 – #27 (after 1395 days)

  5.13.22 – Dreaming Tree, The (after 2449 days)
  5.13.22 – Idea of You (after 1022 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Cynthia Woods Mitchell Pavilion is located in the northern, upper-class suburb of Houston, TX called The Woodlands (a number of famous country music stars have homes here) and is the summer home for the Houston Symphony Orchestra. This venue gets so hot in the summer that it has ceiling fans above the reserved seats to help cool the spectators.

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Gaucho (5.18.12)
Mercy (full band only) (5.18.12)
Sweet (full band only) (5.18.12)


2005 Lake Robbins Dr.
The Woodlands, TX 77380
